regions.text: How do we develop ideas about better and worse? How do we judge what's important? (Illustration: Scales with question marks).
Humans evolved from simple cells through long-term growth and change. (Illustrations: A thoughtful man and a single-celled amoeba).
Even simple life forms have self-control and direction. They don't have complex ideas, but they can regulate themselves within limits.
come by: to develop. judge: to decide what is best. FUTURE: will judge. PRESENT: judge(s). PAST: judged.
